'''Corf Binalie''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the son of [[Pilester Binalie]] and lived on the planet [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]]. When he first met the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Jafer Torles]], he was in awe of him, but after a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|Republic gunship]] destroyed his family's [[Spaarti Creations]] facility, he lost faith in his former idol.
